generator_full.title: Build a full CNA Generator Coil setup with Magnets, Carbon Brushes, and a connected Electric Motor

subtitle.text: SU becomes FE. FE becomes SU. The scroll explains the full conversion. The factory is the proof.

description: CH.10 · NEW AGE POWER
▸ Create: New Age bridges the rotational world
of Create (SU) with the electrical world (FE).
The scroll covers the full conversion system.
This is the foundation of the nuclear age.
◈ CORE CONVERSION CHAIN
└ ✦ Generator Coil: rotation (SU) → FE output
24 SU base impact. Add Magnets to increase FE.
Add Carbon Brushes for efficiency.
Max: 12 Magnets + 12 Carbon Brushes per coil
└ ✦ Electric Motor: FE → SU (reverses conversion)
Useful for FE-heavy setups driving Create machines
RPM output scales with FE input
└ ✦ Energiser: uses BOTH rotation AND FE simultaneously
Special applications only — not general power
◈ WIRE COIL NETWORK
└ FE transfers over wire coils (copper/iron/gold)
└ Copper: lowest tier, short distance
└ Iron: mid-distance, no FE loss over 64 blocks
└ Gold: long distance, minimal loss
└ Switches + Inductors: manage FE distribution
└ Battery Box: FE buffer storage between machines
◈ WHY CONVERT
└ Many non-Create mods run on FE
└ CNA lets your Create windmill or water wheel
power those mods without a separate power source
└ Nuclear Reactor → Boiler → Steam Engine → Coil → FE
is the cleanest high-power setup
◈ SCROLL: New Age Power
└ Found in Create laboratory structures,
engineer workshop chests, high-tier tech loot
└ Research time: 30 min
└ Unlocks: full CNA wire/coil/motor reference,
FE-to-SU conversion ratios, Energiser applications
▸ The first civilization to build a Generator Coil
did not know what they had built.
They called it the Pale Machine.
They built more.
▶ Find The New Age Power scroll [check]
▶ Build a full CNA Generator Coil setup [check]
◇ Nuclear Reactor → Generator Coil is the endgame
power infrastructure. Build the generator first.
Reactor comes after.
